fields.name: Yasir Naeem
fields.title: Full Stack Developer
fields.tagline: Turning ideas into real web apps with Python, Django & React.
fields.about:
BS Computer Science student at the University of Management and Technology (UMT), Lahore, with 6 semesters completed. A Full Stack Developer comfortable across both frontend and backend, with a solid foundation in C++ and a strong command of Python.

Experienced in building complete web applications using React, Next.js, and Django, alongside hands-on work in automation and databases. I keep sharpening my programming and problem-solving skills by building real-world university and personal projects.

fields.institution: University of Management and Technology (UMT), Lahore, Pakistan
fields.description: Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Computer Science at UMT. Relevant coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, Database Systems, Web Technologies, Artificial Intelligence, and Operating Systems.

fields.title: AI Route Optimization
fields.description: Finds the shortest routes on a real city map using AI search algorithms (BFS, DFS, UCS, A*) on live OpenStreetMap data, with an interactive Streamlit dashboard that compares each algorithm.

fields.title: Hospital Management System
fields.description: A comprehensive console-based Hospital Management System in C++ using OOP and file handling. Manages doctors, patients, pharmacy, blood bank, ambulance, equipment, lab reports and receipts.

fields.title: Online Clothing Store
fields.description: A full e-commerce web application for an online clothing brand. Features a product storefront, cart and checkout, user accounts, and a secure admin panel to manage products.

fields.title: WhatsApp Bulk Sender
fields.description: An automation tool that sends bulk WhatsApp messages to a list of numbers read from a data file, using Selenium to drive WhatsApp Web.

fields.title: Hotel Management System (DSA)
fields.description: A Hotel Management System in C++ demonstrating core data structures: Linked Lists for floors and rooms, a Queue for booking requests, and a Stack to cancel the last booking.
fields.technologies: C++, Data Structures, Linked List, Stack, Queue

fields.title: Dynamic Portfolio Website
fields.description: This database-driven portfolio website built with Django. All content is managed through the Django admin panel. Features include skills, education, projects, and a working contact form.
fields.technologies: Django, Python, SQLite, HTML, CSS, JavaScript
